pi_items.metadata_value: NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope WFPC2 (Eagle Nebula)
pi_items.verified_value: NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope WFPC2 (Eagle Nebula)
pi_items.source: FITS headers (INSTRUME='WFPC2', TARGNAME='M16-A') from esahubble.org FITS Liberator datasets

privileged_info_summary: The data originates from real NASA/ESA Hubble Space Telescope WFPC2 observations of the Eagle Nebula (M16-A), as verified by FITS headers and the esahubble.org download source. The images represent the F656N (H-alpha) and F502N ([OIII]) filters respectively. The median pixel values are approximately 86.95 for H-alpha and 6.74 for [OIII], resulting in a scale factor of roughly 12.90 for subtraction.
